channel.title: SUBSUELO FS — Production guides
channel.description: Direct guides for music prompts, negative prompts and sound direction.

item.title: What is a negative prompt in music and when should you use one?
item.description: What it removes, where it goes and when it helps with vocals, instruments or finish.

item.title: How to write music prompts that give a clear direction
item.description: A practical structure for genre, pulse, drums, low end, source material, space and mix.
